# Staat, Staatsbildung und Konfikte

```{r}
#| echo: false
#| message: false

source("_common.R")

```

See @fig-intro_1 for details.

```{r}
#| label: fig-staat_1
#| fig-cap: "Another figure"
#| warning: false

ggplot(data = penguins,
  mapping = aes(x = flipper_length_mm, 
                y = body_mass_g, 
                color = species)) +
  geom_point()+
  labs(x = NULL, y = NULL)+
  theme_light()+
  theme_vp()

```
